info.title: Getmomo Public API
info.description:
Public API for interfacing with the Getmomo service offering.

This API supports both request/response endpoints and webhook event delivery. See the **Webhooks** section for details on event types, payload schemas, and signature verification.

get.description: Retrieves all deposit accounts with pagination support

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of items to skip before returning results

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return

200.description: List of deposit accounts retrieved successfully

get.description: Retrieves a single deposit account by its unique identifier

parameters.name: depositAccountId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the deposit account

get.summary: List all virtual deposit accounts for a deposit account
get.description: Retrieves all virtual deposit accounts associated with a specific deposit account with pagination support

parameters.name: depositAccountId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the deposit account

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of items to skip before returning results

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return

200.description: List of virtual deposit accounts retrieved successfully

post.description: Creates a new virtual deposit account for individual tenant(s) or company tenant. Use the 'type' field to specify which type to create.

parameters.name: depositAccountId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the deposit account

get.summary: Get a single virtual deposit account
get.description: Retrieves a single virtual deposit account by its unique identifier

parameters.name: depositAccountId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the deposit account

parameters.name: virtualDepositAccountId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the virtual deposit account

get.description: Retrieves the current balance of a virtual deposit account

parameters.name: depositAccountId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the deposit account

parameters.name: virtualDepositAccountId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the virtual deposit account

post.description: Sent when a test event is triggered from the Manager App. Use this to verify your webhook endpoint is correctly configured and can validate signatures.

parameters.name: X-Getmomo-Signature
parameters.description: HMAC-SHA256 signature of the request body. Format: `v1,<base64-encoded-signature>`

200.description: Return any 2xx status to acknowledge receipt

post.description: Sent whenever the balance of a virtual deposit account changes. Use this to keep your system in sync with deposit balances managed by Momo. Delivery is retried with exponential backoff on failure; after the final unsuccessful retry, the webhook is automatically disabled and the manager is notified by email.

parameters.name: X-Getmomo-Signature
parameters.description: HMAC-SHA256 signature of the request body. Format: `v1,<base64-encoded-signature>`

200.description: Return any 2xx status to acknowledge receipt

bearerAuth.description: Bearer token authentication. Include the token in the Authorization header as 'Bearer {token}'

givenReference.description: Optional reference for the tenancy. We recommend a combination of the tenancy agreement number and property number (e.g. M03879.Obj0842)

sourceId.description: Optional identifier from your own system. Use this to link the virtual deposit account to records in your property management software or internal database

streetName.description: Street name of the rental property

streetNumber.description: Street number of the rental property

postalCode.description: Postal code of the rental property

countryCode.description: Country code. Only 'DE' (Deutschland) is accepted as we only support German addresses

depositAmountCents.description: Deposit amount in cents. Must be a positive integer

rentalContractStartDate.description: Optional start date of the rental contract (ISO 8601 date format, e.g. 2025-01-01)

type.description: Type of virtual deposit account. Must be 'INDIVIDUAL'
Type of virtual deposit account. Must be 'COMPANY'

dateOfBirth.description: Date of birth of the tenant (ISO 8601 date format: YYYY-MM-DD). It is highly encouraged to always provide the tenant date of birth to avoid follow-up queries for this information from our partner bank.

firstName.description: First name of the company director

lastName.description: Last name of the company director

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the entity was created (ISO 8601 with timezone)

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the entity was last updated (ISO 8601 with timezone)

iban.description: The virtual IBAN allocated to this virtual deposit account

appLink.description: Deep link to this virtual deposit account in the Manager App

type.description: Type of tenant for this virtual deposit account

givenReference.description: Optional reference for the tenancy. We recommend a combination of the tenancy agreement number and property number (e.g. M03879.Obj0842)

sourceId.description: Optional identifier from your own system. Use this to link the virtual deposit account to records in your property management software or internal database

streetName.description: Street name of the rental property

streetNumber.description: Street number of the rental property

postalCode.description: Postal code of the rental property

countryCode.description: Country code. Only 'DE' (Deutschland) is accepted as we only support German addresses

depositAmountCents.description: Deposit amount in cents. Must be a positive integer

rentalContractStartDate.description: Optional start date of the rental contract (ISO 8601 date format, e.g. 2025-01-01)

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the balance was last updated (ISO 8601 with timezone). Null if no transactions have occurred.

title.description: Optional title for the deposit account

bic.description: BIC/SWIFT code of the deposit account

isDefault.description: Indicates whether this is the default deposit account.

offset.description: Number of items skipped before these results

limit.description: Maximum number of items returned in this response

items.description: List of deposit accounts for the current page
List of virtual deposit accounts for the current page

triggered_at.description: Timestamp when the test event was triggered (ISO 8601 with timezone)

depositAccountId.description: Identifier of the parent deposit account

virtualDepositAccountId.description: Identifier of the virtual deposit account whose balance changed

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the balance was updated (ISO 8601 with timezone)

WebhookEvent.description: Common envelope for all webhook events. The `type` field determines the shape of `payload`.

payload.description: Event-specific payload. Shape depends on the event type.

details.description: Additional error details, such as field-specific validation errors

BadRequest.description: Bad Request - Invalid input data or validation errors

details.tenants[1].lastName: This field is required when tenants[1].firstName is provided

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid Bearer token

example.message: Authentication required. Please provide a valid Bearer token

NotFound.description: Not Found - The requested resource does not exist

Conflict.description: Conflict - The request conflicts with the current state (e.g., duplicate account)

value.message: A virtual deposit account with this source ID already exists
No available virtual IBANs for this deposit account. Please contact support.

InternalServerError.description: Internal Server Error - An unexpected error occurred on the server

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later

PayloadTooLarge.description: Payload Too Large - The request body exceeds the maximum allowed size (100KB)

tags.name: Virtual Deposit Accounts
tags.description: Endpoints for managing virtual deposit accounts for rental properties

tags.name: Webhooks
